capital_after.description: 10,000 Equity Shares of ₹10 each aggregating to ₹1,00,000

events.particulars: Initial Authorised Share Capital at the time of incorporation of the Company.

capital_before.description: 10,000 Equity Shares of ₹10 each aggregating to ₹1,00,000

capital_after.description: 50,000 Equity Shares of ₹10 each aggregating to ₹5,00,000

events.particulars: Increase in Authorised Share Capital from ₹1,00,000 to ₹5,00,000 by creation of additional 40,000 Equity Shares of ₹10 each.

capital_before.description: 50,000 Equity Shares of ₹10 each aggregating to ₹5,00,000

capital_after.description: 1,00,000 Equity Shares of ₹10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of ₹10 each aggregating to ₹15,00,000

events.particulars: Increase in Authorised Share Capital from ₹5,00,000 to ₹15,00,000 by creation of additional 50,000 Equity Shares and introduction of 50,000 Preference Shares of ₹10 each.

capital_before.description: 1,00,000 Equity Shares of ₹10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of ₹10 each aggregating to ₹15,00,000

capital_after.description: 5,00,000 Equity Shares of ₹10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of ₹10 each aggregating to ₹55,00,000

events.particulars: Increase in Authorised Equity Share Capital from ₹10,00,000 to ₹50,00,000 by creation of additional 4,00,000 Equity Shares of ₹10 each. Preference Share Capital remains unchanged at ₹5,00,000.

capital_before.description: 5,00,000 Equity Shares of ₹10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of ₹10 each aggregating to ₹55,00,000

capital_after.description: 25,00,000 Equity Shares of ₹2 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of ₹10 each aggregating to ₹55,00,000

events.particulars: Sub-division of Equity Shares from face value of ₹10 each to ₹2 each. Each Equity Share of ₹10 subdivided into 5 Equity Shares of ₹2 each. Total Authorised Share Capital remains unchanged at ₹55,00,000.

flags.reason: Board resolution dated 2021-09-15 but SH-7 references EGM date as 2021-09-22. Discrepancy of 7 days — board resolution precedes EGM as expected, but verify EGM notice for actual meeting date.
PAS-3 (Return of Allotment) found in attachments — not relevant to authorised capital alteration. Excluded from extraction.

Sub-division event: total authorised capital unchanged at ₹55,00,000 but share count and face value changed. Verified arithmetic: 25,00,000 × ₹2 = ₹50,00,000 (equity) + 50,000 × ₹10 = ₹5,00,000 (preference) = ₹55,00,000.
